message:
Usage: /gsd codebase [generate|update|stats]

  generate [--max-files N] [--collapse-threshold N]  — Generate or regenerate CODEBASE.md
  update [--max-files N] [--collapse-threshold N]    — Refresh the CODEBASE.md cache immediately
  stats                                              — Show file count, coverage, and generation time
  help                                               — Show this help

With no subcommand, shows stats if a map exists or help if not.
GSD also refreshes CODEBASE.md…

Codebase map generated: 500 files
Written to: J:\CLASSIC-Fallout4\.gsd\CODEBASE.md
⚠ Truncated — increase --max-files to include all files

Codebase map generated: 1698 files
Written to: J:\CLASSIC-Fallout4\.gsd\CODEBASE.md

Codebase Map Stats:
  Files: 1698
  Described: 0 (0%)
  Undescribed: 1698
  Generated: 2026-05-19T02:34:10Z

Tip: Auto-refresh keeps the cache current, but /gsd codebase update forces an immediate refresh.
